title: キタサンブラック登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black is an Umamusume born to a
legendary enka singer whom she greatly respects.
Her dream is to race on huge stages and to bring
a smile to everyone just like her father.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her rival is Satono Diamond. When they were
younger, the two promised to race in the Classic
Triple Crown together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She idolizes Tokai Teio and hopes to reach her
full potential and be just like her idol someday.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, Kitasan Black and I are going to take
on the Twinkle Series!
